description: Executive gross technical availability reporting from storage-efficient daily KPI and long-lived incident events. Planned maintenance is not excluded. Use the dashboard time range, reporting period, SLA, and scope filters to produce daily, weekly, monthly, and year-over-year reports.

panels.title: Targets
panels.description: Distinct targets with KPI observations in the selected time range and filter scope.

panels.title: Availability
panels.description: Equal-weight average of each target's gross technical availability in the selected time range. Planned maintenance is not excluded.

targets.rawSql:
WITH target_kpi AS (
  SELECT d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
)
SELECT coalesce(round(avg(availability), 2), 0) AS availability_pct FROM target_kpi;

panels.title: SLA Met
panels.description: Percentage of observed targets whose availability meets the selected SLA threshold.

targets.rawSql:
WITH target_kpi AS (
  SELECT d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
)
SELECT coalesce(round(count(*) FILTER (WHERE availability >= ${sla:raw})::numeric / nullif(count(*), 0) * 100, 2), 0) AS sla_met_pct FROM target_kpi;

panels.title: Below SLA
panels.description: Number of observed targets whose availability is below the selected SLA threshold.

targets.rawSql:
WITH target_kpi AS (
  SELECT d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
)
SELECT count(*) FILTER (WHERE availability < ${sla:raw})::bigint AS below_sla FROM target_kpi;

panels.title: Down Target-Min
panels.description: Total failed target-minutes. For example, two targets down for ten minutes equal twenty target-minutes.

panels.title: Incident Starts
panels.description: Downtime events whose start timestamp falls inside the selected time range.

panels.title: MTTR (Closed)
panels.description: Average duration in minutes of closed downtime events that started in the selected time range. Open events are excluded.

panels.title: Avg Latency
panels.description: Weighted average latency of successful probes from the normalized hourly KPI.

targets.rawSql:
WITH target_period AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('${grain:raw}', d.period_start::timestamptz) AS period_start, d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT period_start AS "time", 'Availability' AS metric, round(avg(availability), 2)::double precision AS value
FROM target_period
GROUP BY period_start
ORDER BY period_start;

WITH target_period AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('${grain:raw}', d.period_start::timestamptz) AS period_start, d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT period_start AS "time", 'SLA Met' AS metric, round(count(*) FILTER (WHERE availability >= ${sla:raw})::numeric / nullif(count(*), 0) * 100, 2)::double precision AS value
FROM target_period
GROUP BY period_start
ORDER BY period_start;

SELECT date_trunc('${grain:raw}', d.period_start::timestamptz) AS "time", 'Down Target-Minutes' AS metric, sum(d.down_probes)::double precision AS value
FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('${grain:raw}', $__timeFrom()::timestamptz) AS from_at, date_trunc('${grain:raw}', $__timeTo()::timestamptz) AS to_at
), buckets AS (
  SELECT generate_series(from_at, to_at, CASE '${grain:raw}' WHEN 'day' THEN interval '1 day' WHEN 'week' THEN interval '1 week' ELSE interval '1 month' END) AS period_start
  FROM bounds
), incidents AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('${grain:raw}', e.down_start) AS period_start, count(*)::double precision AS incident_count
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_downtime_events e
  WHERE e.down_start::date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR e.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR e.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR e.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(e.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(e.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT b.period_start AS "time", 'Incidents' AS metric, coalesce(i.incident_count, 0) AS value
FROM buckets b
LEFT JOIN incidents i USING (period_start)
ORDER BY b.period_start;

WITH target_kpi AS (
  SELECT d.target_name, max(d.environment) AS environment, max(d.db_type) AS db_type, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
)
SELECT now() AS "time", environment || ' / ' || db_type AS metric, round(avg(availability), 2)::double precision AS value
FROM target_kpi
GROUP BY environment, db_type
ORDER BY value ASC, metric;

WITH target_kpi AS (
  SELECT d.target_name, coalesce(max(d.criticality), 'unassigned') AS criticality, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
)
SELECT now() AS "time", criticality AS metric, round(avg(availability), 2)::double precision AS value
FROM target_kpi
GROUP BY criticality
ORDER BY value ASC, metric;

WITH target_kpi AS (
  SELECT d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
), bottom_targets AS (
  SELECT target_name, availability FROM target_kpi ORDER BY availability ASC, target_name LIMIT 10
)
SELECT now() AS "time", target_name AS metric, round(availability, 2)::double precision AS value
FROM bottom_targets
ORDER BY value ASC, metric;

panels.title: Period KPI Summary
panels.description: Export-ready KPI summary grouped by the selected daily, weekly, or monthly reporting period.

targets.rawSql:
WITH target_period AS (
  SELECT date_trunc('${grain:raw}', d.period_start::timestamptz) AS period_start, d.target_name, sum(d.probes)::bigint AS observed_minutes, sum(d.up_probes)::bigint AS up_minutes, sum(d.down_probes)::bigint AS down_minutes, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability, sum(d.latency_ms_sum) AS latency_ms_sum, sum(d.latency_ms_count)::bigint AS latency_ms_count
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT period_start, count(*)::bigint AS targets, sum(observed_minutes)::bigint AS observed_target_minutes, sum(up_minutes)::bigint AS up_target_minutes, sum(down_minutes)::bigint AS down_target_minutes, round(avg(availability), 2) AS availability_pct, count(*) FILTER (WHERE availability >= ${sla:raw})::bigint AS targets_meeting_sla, count(*) FILTER (WHERE availability < ${sla:raw})::bigint AS targets_below_sla, round(sum(latency_ms_sum) / nullif(sum(latency_ms_count), 0), 2) AS avg_latency_ms
FROM target_period
GROUP BY period_start
ORDER BY period_start DESC;

panels.title: Target KPI Detail
panels.description: Per-target KPI detail for the selected range, ordered from the lowest availability to support exception reporting.

targets.rawSql:
WITH target_kpi AS (
  SELECT d.target_name, max(d.environment) AS environment, max(d.db_type) AS db_type, coalesce(max(d.criticality), 'unassigned') AS criticality, coalesce(max(d.team), 'unassigned') AS team, sum(d.probes)::bigint AS observed_minutes, sum(d.up_probes)::bigint AS up_minutes, sum(d.down_probes)::bigint AS down_minutes, sum(d.slow_probes)::bigint AS slow_minutes, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability, sum(d.latency_ms_sum) AS latency_ms_sum, sum(d.latency_ms_count)::bigint AS latency_ms_count, max(d.max_latency_ms) AS max_latency_ms
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
), incidents AS (
  SELECT e.target_name, count(*)::bigint AS incidents_started
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_downtime_events e
  WHERE e.down_start::date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR e.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR e.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR e.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(e.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(e.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY e.target_name
)
SELECT k.target_name, k.environment, k.db_type, k.criticality, k.team, CASE WHEN latest.is_up = 1 THEN 'UP' WHEN latest.is_up = 0 THEN 'DOWN' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS current_status, k.observed_minutes, k.up_minutes, k.down_minutes, round(k.availability, 2) AS availability_pct, CASE WHEN k.availability >= ${sla:raw} THEN 'MET' ELSE 'BELOW' END AS sla_status, coalesce(i.incidents_started, 0)::bigint AS incidents_started, k.slow_minutes, round(k.latency_ms_sum / nullif(k.latency_ms_count, 0), 2) AS avg_latency_ms, round(k.max_latency_ms, 2) AS max_latency_ms, latest.checked_at AS last_probe_at
FROM target_kpi k
LEFT JOIN incidents i USING (target_name)
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT r.checked_at, r.is_up
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_probe_results r
  WHERE r.target_name = k.target_name
  ORDER BY r.checked_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
) latest ON true
ORDER BY k.availability ASC, k.down_minutes DESC, k.target_name;

panels.title: Downtime Incident Detail
panels.description: Downtime events overlapping the selected range. Duration in range is clipped to the report window; full duration covers the entire event.

targets.rawSql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS from_at, $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS to_at
)
SELECT e.target_name, e.environment, e.db_type, coalesce(e.criticality, 'unassigned') AS criticality, coalesce(e.team, 'unassigned') AS team, e.down_start, e.down_end, CASE WHEN e.down_end IS NULL THEN 'OPEN' ELSE 'CLOSED' END AS event_status, round(extract(epoch FROM least(coalesce(e.down_end, now()), b.to_at) - greatest(e.down_start, b.from_at))::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS duration_in_range_minutes, round(extract(epoch FROM coalesce(e.down_end, now()) - e.down_start)::numeric / 60.0, 2) AS full_duration_minutes, e.down_samples, e.first_error_text, e.last_error_text
FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_downtime_events e
CROSS JOIN bounds b
WHERE e.down_start < b.to_at AND coalesce(e.down_end, now()) > b.from_at AND ('$environment' = '%' OR e.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR e.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR e.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(e.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(e.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
ORDER BY e.down_start DESC
LIMIT 500;

panels.title: Availability YoY
panels.description: Availability difference in percentage points between the selected range and the same calendar dates one year earlier.

targets.rawSql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT $__timeFrom()::date AS from_date, $__timeTo()::date AS to_date
), target_window AS (
  SELECT 'current' AS report_window, d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN b.from_date AND b.to_date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'previous_year', d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN (b.from_date - interval '1 year')::date AND (b.to_date - interval '1 year')::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY d.target_name
), summary AS (
  SELECT report_window, avg(availability) AS availability FROM target_window GROUP BY report_window
)
SELECT round((max(availability) FILTER (WHERE report_window = 'current') - max(availability) FILTER (WHERE report_window = 'previous_year'))::numeric, 2)::double precision AS availability_yoy_pp
FROM summary;

panels.title: Downtime YoY
panels.description: Change in failed target-minutes versus the same calendar dates one year earlier. A negative value is an improvement.

targets.rawSql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT $__timeFrom()::date AS from_date, $__timeTo()::date AS to_date
), summary AS (
  SELECT 'current' AS report_window, sum(d.down_probes)::numeric AS down_target_minutes
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN b.from_date AND b.to_date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'previous_year', sum(d.down_probes)::numeric
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN (b.from_date - interval '1 year')::date AND (b.to_date - interval '1 year')::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
)
SELECT (max(down_target_minutes) FILTER (WHERE report_window = 'current') - max(down_target_minutes) FILTER (WHERE report_window = 'previous_year'))::double precision AS downtime_yoy_target_minutes
FROM summary;

panels.title: Incidents YoY
panels.description: Change in downtime incidents started versus the same calendar dates one year earlier. A negative value is an improvement.

panels.title: Error Budget Used
panels.description: Share of the selected SLA downtime allowance already consumed. Values above 100 percent mean the error budget has been exceeded.

panels.title: Availability: Current vs Previous Year
panels.description: Previous-year observations are shifted forward one calendar year so equivalent dates align with the selected reporting window.

targets.rawSql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT $__timeFrom()::date AS from_date, $__timeTo()::date AS to_date
), target_period AS (
  SELECT 'Current' AS metric, date_trunc('${grain:raw}', d.period_start::timestamptz) AS period_start, d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN b.from_date AND b.to_date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY 2, 3
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Previous Year', date_trunc('${grain:raw}', (d.period_start + interval '1 year')::timestamptz), d.target_name, sum(d.up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.probes), 0) * 100
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN (b.from_date - interval '1 year')::date AND (b.to_date - interval '1 year')::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  GROUP BY 2, 3
)
SELECT period_start AS "time", metric, round(avg(availability), 2)::double precision AS value
FROM target_period
GROUP BY period_start, metric
ORDER BY period_start, metric;

panels.title: Executive YoY Comparison
panels.description: Export-ready comparison of the selected range against the same calendar dates one year earlier. Missing prior-year data remains empty.

targets.rawSql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT $__timeFrom()::date AS from_date, $__timeTo()::date AS to_date
), daily_window AS (
  SELECT 'current' AS report_window, d.*
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN b.from_date AND b.to_date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'previous_year', d.*
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_daily_kpi d CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE d.period_start BETWEEN (b.from_date - interval '1 year')::date AND (b.to_date - interval '1 year')::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR d.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR d.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR d.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(d.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(d.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
), target_kpi AS (
  SELECT report_window, target_name, sum(up_probes)::numeric / nullif(sum(probes), 0) * 100 AS availability
  FROM daily_window GROUP BY report_window, target_name
), target_summary AS (
  SELECT report_window, count(*)::numeric AS targets, avg(availability) AS availability_pct, count(*) FILTER (WHERE availability >= ${sla:raw})::numeric / nullif(count(*), 0) * 100 AS sla_met_pct
  FROM target_kpi GROUP BY report_window
), daily_summary AS (
  SELECT report_window, sum(down_probes)::numeric AS down_target_minutes, sum(latency_ms_sum) / nullif(sum(latency_ms_count), 0) AS avg_latency_ms
  FROM daily_window GROUP BY report_window
), event_window AS (
  SELECT 'current' AS report_window, e.down_start, e.down_end
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_downtime_events e CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE e.down_start::date BETWEEN b.from_date AND b.to_date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR e.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR e.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR e.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(e.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(e.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'previous_year', e.down_start, e.down_end
  FROM monitoring.db_port_blackbox_downtime_events e CROSS JOIN bounds b
  WHERE e.down_start::date BETWEEN (b.from_date - interval '1 year')::date AND (b.to_date - interval '1 year')::date AND ('$environment' = '%' OR e.environment = '$environment') AND ('$db_type' = '%' OR e.db_type = '$db_type') AND ('$target' = '%' OR e.target_name = '$target') AND ('$criticality' = '%' OR coalesce(e.criticality, 'unassigned') = '$criticality') AND ('$team' = '%' OR coalesce(e.team, 'unassigned') = '$team')
), event_summary AS (
  SELECT report_window, count(*)::numeric AS incidents, avg(extract(epoch FROM down_end - down_start) / 60.0) FILTER (WHERE down_end IS NOT NULL) AS mttr_minutes
  FROM event_window GROUP BY report_window
), summary AS (
  SELECT w.report_window, t.targets, t.availability_pct, t.sla_met_pct, d.down_target_minutes, d.avg_latency_ms, CASE WHEN t.targets IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE coalesce(e.incidents, 0) END AS incidents, e.mttr_minutes
  FROM (VALUES ('current'), ('previous_year')) AS w(report_window)
  LEFT JOIN target_summary t USING (report_window)
  LEFT JOIN daily_summary d USING (report_window)
  LEFT JOIN event_summary e USING (report_window)
), comparison AS (
  SELECT c.*, p.targets AS previous_targets, p.availability_pct AS previous_availability_pct, p.sla_met_pct AS previous_sla_met_pct, p.down_target_minutes AS previous_down_target_minutes, p.avg_latency_ms AS previous_avg_latency_ms, p.incidents AS previous_incidents, p.mttr_minutes AS previous_mttr_minutes
  FROM summary c CROSS JOIN summary p
  WHERE c.report_window = 'current' AND p.report_window = 'previous_year'
)
SELECT metric, round(current_value, 2) AS current_value, round(previous_value, 2) AS previous_year_value, round(current_value - previous_value, 2) AS delta, delta_unit
FROM (
  SELECT 1 AS sort_order, 'Targets' AS metric, targets AS current_value, previous_targets AS previous_value, 'count' AS delta_unit FROM comparison
  UNION ALL SELECT 2, 'Availability', availability_pct, previous_availability_pct, 'percentage points' FROM comparison
  UNION ALL SELECT 3, 'SLA Met', sla_met_pct, previous_sla_met_pct, 'percentage points' FROM comparison
  UNION ALL SELECT 4, 'Down Target-Minutes', down_target_minutes, previous_down_target_minutes, 'target-minutes' FROM comparison
  UNION ALL SELECT 5, 'Incidents Started', incidents, previous_incidents, 'count' FROM comparison
  UNION ALL SELECT 6, 'MTTR Closed', mttr_minutes, previous_mttr_minutes, 'minutes' FROM comparison
  UNION ALL SELECT 7, 'Average Latency', avg_latency_ms, previous_avg_latency_ms, 'milliseconds' FROM comparison
) metrics
ORDER BY sort_order;

panels.title: Reporting History Coverage
panels.description: Shows the retained reporting horizon and whether data exists for the selected range's previous-year comparison.
